channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17716] add 'tunefs.lustre --replace' to allow OST to be skip MGS registration
item.description:
If an new target filesystem is not formatted with "mkfs.lustre --replace" for some reason (e.g. existing scripts/framework to format the filesystem), then it would be useful to have a "tunefs.lustre --replace" option to reset the OST config, label, etc. so that it can be re-added to the filesystem without trying to register with the MGS again. Otherwise, the OST will try to re-register with the MGS because LDD_F_VIRGIN is set at mount time and fail.

It looks like this is almost possible with the existing code, but if it is then it isn't documented in tunefs.lustre.8 man page.
item.summary: add 'tunefs.lustre --replace' to allow OST to be skip MGS registration

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59035/
Subject: LU-17716 utils: add "tunefs.lustre --replace" option
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 48301dd9625b536861d21f2d3b7646cf61cda470

"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/59035
Subject: LU-17716 utils: add "tunefs.lustre --replace" option
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 76447bcdfa319f4dab58d4ac55e8c457b6870863

I'm fixing lustre/utils/mkfs_lustre.c to make "--replace" option can be used by both mkfs.lustre and tunefs.lustre. With this option specified, the LDD_F_VIRGIN flag will be cleared, then mgs_set_index() will pass in mgs_write_log_target(), and mgs_write_log_ost() will be skipped.

The issue can be easily reproduced on master branch:

# mkfs.lustre --mgs --fsname=lustre --mdt --index=0 --reformat /dev/vda7

Permanent disk data:
Target: lustre:MDT0000
Index: 0
Lustre FS: lustre
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x65
(MDT MGS first_time update )
Persistent mount opts: user_xattr,errors=remount-ro
Parameters:

device size = 10240MB
formatting backing filesystem ldiskfs on /dev/vda7
target name lustre:MDT0000
kilobytes 10485760
options -J size=409 -I 1024 -i 2560 -q -O uninit_bg,^extents,dirdata,dir_nlink,quota,project,huge_file,ea_inode,large_dir,^fast_commit,flex_bg -E lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init="0",packed_meta_blocks -F
mkfs_cmd = mke2fs -j -b 4096 -L lustre:MDT0000 -J size=409 -I 1024 -i 2560 -q -O uninit_bg,^extents,dirdata,dir_nlink,quota,project,huge_file,ea_inode,large_dir,^fast_commit,flex_bg -E lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init="0",packed_m
eta_blocks -F /dev/vda7 10485760k
Writing CONFIGS/mountdata
# mkfs.lustre --mgsnode=10.240.26.160@tcp --fsname=lustre --ost --index=0 --reformat /dev/vda5

Permanent disk data:
Target: lustre:OST0000
Index: 0
Lustre FS: lustre
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x62
(OST first_time update )
Persistent mount opts: ,errors=remount-ro
Parameters: mgsnode=10.240.26.160@tcp

device size = 10240MB
formatting backing filesystem ldiskfs on /dev/vda5
target name lustre:OST0000
kilobytes 10485760
options -J size=409 -I 512 -q -O uninit_bg,extents,dir_nlink,quota,project,huge_file,large_dir,^fast_commit,flex_bg -G 256 -E resize="4290772992",lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init="0",packed_meta_blocks -F
mkfs_cmd = mke2fs -j -b 4096 -L lustre:OST0000 -J size=409 -I 512 -q -O uninit_bg,extents,dir_nlink,quota,project,huge_file,large_dir,^fast_commit,flex_bg -G 256 -E resize="4290772992",lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init="0",packed_m
eta_blocks -F /dev/vda5 10485760k
Writing CONFIGS/mountdata
# mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-mds1; mount -t lustre /dev/vda7 /mnt/lustre-mds1
# mkdir -p /mnt/lustre-ost1; mount -t lustre /dev/vda5 /mnt/lustre-ost1

# umount /mnt/lustre-ost1
# mkfs.lustre --mgsnode=10.240.26.160@tcp --fsname=lustre --ost --index=0 --reformat /dev/vda5

Permanent disk data:
Target: lustre:OST0000
Index: 0
Lustre FS: lustre
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x62
(OST first_time update )
Persistent mount opts: ,errors=remount-ro
Parameters: mgsnode=10.240.26.160@tcp

device size = 10240MB
formatting backing filesystem ldiskfs on /dev/vda5
target name lustre:OST0000
kilobytes 10485760
options -J size=409 -I 512 -q -O uninit_bg,extents,dir_nlink,quota,project,huge_file,large_dir,^fast_commit,flex_bg -G 256 -E resize="4290772992",lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init="0",packed_meta_blocks -F
mkfs_cmd = mke2fs -j -b 4096 -L lustre:OST0000 -J size=409 -I 512 -q -O uninit_bg,extents,dir_nlink,quota,project,huge_file,large_dir,^fast_commit,flex_bg -G 256 -E resize="4290772992",lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init="0",packed_meta_blocks -F /dev/vda5 10485760k
Writing CONFIGS/mountdata
# mount -t lustre /dev/vda5 /mnt/lustre-ost1
mount.lustre: mount /dev/vda5 at /mnt/lustre-ost1 failed: Address already in use
The target service's index is already in use. (/dev/vda5)
# mkfs.lustre --mgsnode=10.240.26.160@tcp --fsname=lustre --ost --index=0 --reformat --replace /dev/vda5

Permanent disk data:
Target: lustre-OST0000
Index: 0
Lustre FS: lustre
Mount type: ldiskfs
Flags: 0x42
(OST update )
Persistent mount opts: ,errors=remount-ro
Parameters: mgsnode=10.240.26.160@tcp

device size = 10240MB
formatting backing filesystem ldiskfs on /dev/vda5
target name lustre-OST0000
kilobytes 10485760
options -J size=409 -I 512 -q -O uninit_bg,extents,dir_nlink,quota,project,huge_file,large_dir,^fast_commit,flex_bg -G 256 -E resize="4290772992",lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init="0",packed_meta_blocks -F
mkfs_cmd = mke2fs -j -b 4096 -L lustre-OST0000 -J size=409 -I 512 -q -O uninit_bg,extents,dir_nlink,quota,project,huge_file,large_dir,^fast_commit,flex_bg -G 256 -E resize="4290772992",lazy_journal_init,lazy_itable_init="0",packed_meta_blocks -F /dev/vda5 10485760k
Writing CONFIGS/mountdata
# mount -t lustre /dev/vda5 /mnt/lustre-ost1
# df -T /mnt/lustre-ost1
Filesystem Type 1K-blocks Used Available Use% Mounted on
/dev/vda5 lustre 9625968 1252 9084044 1% /mnt/lustre-ost1
